title: Algeria.
content:
Dolly's home's far away,
        Far away in Algiers,
    On the African coast,
        She won't see it for years.

    But she whispers at night,
        And her eyes fill with tears;
    "How I wish--how I wish,
        I were back in Algiers!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Richard Hunter delivers a powerful performance in "Algeria."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
